actionUnits.condition: Physics trigger enter on Elevator's BoxCollider (id: 1067963289, isTrigger: true). This should invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter(Collider) on MonoBehaviour (id: 1067963293, m_Script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) when a different object with a Collider/Rigidbody (e.g., Player, fileID: 7425022) enters. Note: Current script compares 'gameObject == player' (Elevator vs Player). Unless the 'player' field is set to the Elevator itself, the parenting code path will not execute; this test still covers the OnTriggerEnter method body execution.

Physics trigger exit on Elevator's BoxCollider (id: 1067963289, isTrigger: true). This should invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit(Collider) on MonoBehaviour (id: 1067963293, m_Script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) when the same object (e.g., Player, fileID: 7425022) leaves the trigger volume. Note: Due to 'gameObject == player' check, unparenting will not occur unless 'player' references the Elevator; this test still covers OnTriggerExit method body execution.
